tabs.providers.label: Providers
settings.secrets.enabled.label: Hide Secrets
settings.secrets.enabled.description: Obfuscate secrets before sending to AI providers
settings.providers.ollama-cloud.maxConcu: Maximum concurrent Ollama Cloud subagent runs per process; 0 disables the provider-specific limit
settings.providers.webSearch.label: Web Search Provider
settings.providers.webSearch.description: Preferred provider for the web_search tool
settings.providers.webSearchExclude.desc: Providers that web_search should never use, even as fallbacks
settings.providers.antigravityEndpoint.d: Endpoint routing strategy for google-antigravity providers (chat, search, image, discovery)
settings.providers.antigravityEndpoint.o: Try production endpoint, fail over to sandbox on 5xx/429
settings.providers.image.label: Image Provider
settings.providers.image.options.auto.de: Priority: GPT model image tool > Antigravity > xAI > OpenRouter > Gemini
Uses the active GPT Responses/Codex model
settings.providers.image.options.xai.des: Requires xAI Grok OAuth or XAI_API_KEY
settings.providers.fireworksTier.label: Fireworks Tier
settings.providers.fireworksTier.options: Priority serving path: higher reliability, premium per-token pricing
settings.providers.tts.label: Text-to-Speech Provider
settings.providers.tts.description: Backend for the tts tool: local on-device neural TTS (Kokoro-82M) or xAI Grok Voice
settings.providers.tts.options.auto.desc: Prefer local on-device TTS; route .mp3 output to xAI when credentials exist
settings.providers.tts.options.local.des: On-device neural TTS (Kokoro-82M); output is WAV/PCM16
settings.providers.tts.options.xai.label: xAI Grok Voice
settings.providers.tts.options.xai.descr: Requires xAI Grok OAuth or XAI_API_KEY; MP3 or WAV
settings.tts.localModel.label: Local TTS Model
settings.tts.localModel.description: On-device neural TTS model (Kokoro-82M) used by the local TTS backend
settings.tts.localVoice.label: Local TTS Voice
settings.tts.localVoice.description: Kokoro voice used by the local TTS backend (American/British, female/male)
settings.speech.enabled.label: Speech Vocalization
settings.speech.enabled.description: Speak the assistant's output aloud through the speakers as it streams
settings.speech.mode.label: Speech Vocalization Mode
settings.speech.mode.description: What to speak: all = assistant messages + thinking; assistant = messages only; yield = only the final message at turn end
settings.speech.mode.options.all.label: All (messages + thinking)
settings.speech.mode.options.yield.label: Final message only
settings.speech.voice.label: Speech Vocalization Voice
settings.speech.voice.description: Kokoro voice used when speaking the assistant's output aloud
settings.providers.tinyModel.label: Tiny Model
settings.providers.tinyModel.description: Session-title model: online (the TINY role from /models, else pi/smol) by default, or a local on-device model
settings.providers.tinyModelDevice.label: Tiny Model Device
settings.providers.tinyModelDevice.descr: ONNX execution provider for local tiny models (titles + memory). Default uses CPU-only inference. The PI_TINY_DEVICE env var overrides this.
settings.providers.tinyModelDtype.label: Tiny Model Precision
settings.providers.tinyModelDtype.descri: ONNX quantization/precision for local tiny models. Default uses each model's shipped dtype (q4); lower precision is faster, higher is more faithful. The PI_TINY_DTYPE env var overrides this.
settings.providers.unexpectedStopModel.d: Classifier for unexpected-stop detection: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol) by default, or a local on-device model.
settings.providers.kimiApiFormat.label: Kimi API Format
settings.providers.kimiApiFormat.descrip: API format for Kimi Code provider
settings.providers.openaiWebsockets.desc: Websocket policy for OpenAI Codex models (auto uses model defaults, on forces, off disables)
settings.providers.openaiWebsockets.opti: Disable websockets for OpenAI Codex models
Force websockets for OpenAI Codex models
settings.providers.openrouterVariant.des: Default routing-variant suffix appended to OpenRouter model IDs (overridden when the selector already names a variant)
settings.providers.openrouterVariant.opt: No suffix; use OpenRouter's default routing
Cherry-picked high-quality providers (only defined for select models)
settings.providers.fetch.label: Fetch Provider
settings.providers.fetch.description: Reader backend priority for the fetch/read URL tool
settings.providers.fetch.options.auto.de: Priority: native > trafilatura > lynx > parallel > jina
settings.codexResets.autoRedeem.label: Codex Auto-Redeem Saved Resets
settings.codexResets.autoRedeem.descript: When a turn is blocked by the Codex weekly limit on the active account and no other account is available, run the conservative saved-reset check. unset asks before spending the first eligible reset, yes spends eligible resets without prompting, and no disables the check entirely. Requires retries enabled.
Check eligibility, then ask before spending the first saved reset.
Spend eligible saved resets without prompting.
Do not run the saved-reset auto-redeem check.
settings.codexResets.minBlockedMinutes.d: Only auto-redeem when the natural weekly reset is at least this many minutes away (don't spend a ~30-day credit to save a short wait).
settings.codexResets.keepCredits.label: Codex Auto-Redeem Reserve
settings.codexResets.keepCredits.descrip: Never auto-spend below this many saved resets (0 = the last credit may be spent automatically).
settings.provider.appendOnlyContext.desc: Cache system prompt + tool specs and keep an append-only message log so provider prefix caches (DeepSeek, Xiaomi/SGLang, Anthropic) hit at maximum rate. Auto enables for known prefix-cache providers.
settings.exa.enableSearch.label: Exa Search
settings.exa.enableSearch.description: Enable Exa basic search, deep search, code search, and crawl tools
settings.exa.searchDelayMs.label: Exa Search Delay
settings.exa.searchDelayMs.description: Minimum delay between Exa web search requests in milliseconds; set 0 to disable pacing
settings.exa.enableResearcher.label: Exa Researcher
settings.exa.enableResearcher.descriptio: Enable the Exa researcher tool for AI-powered deep research
settings.exa.enableWebsets.label: Exa Websets
settings.exa.enableWebsets.description: Enable Exa webset management and enrichment tools
settings.searxng.endpoint.label: SearXNG Endpoint
settings.searxng.endpoint.description: Base URL of a self-hosted SearXNG instance used for web search
